title: Ethic of Justice - Ethical Educational Leadership
content: Definition Theethicofjusticeemphasizes individual human rights and freedoms, the rule of law, and the values of fairness andjustice(Frick et al., 2012; Shapiro et al., 2014). Beckner (2004) referred to thisethicas rule-based, as it attempts to objectively resolve ethical dilemmas through pre-established principles, rules, and laws. In this way, theethicofjusticeis deontological and ...
